pip_2026-07-15.mp4.title: Happy National Gummi Worm Day! 🐛
pip_2026-07-15.mp4.description:
Experiment Log #7152: I found the BIGGEST gummi worm in the whole wide world! 🤩 What secrets is it hiding inside? Let's find out in the name of science (and snacks)! 🌈 What should I try to magically squish in my next experiment? Let me know below! Pip-pip!
